items.description: This hearty dish is like a workout in the form of a meal.  Consume it to deal increased melee damage, and gain extra stamina regen.  Effects last 15 minutes.

items.description: This brew doesn't have any nutritional value, but fills your stamina.

items.name: Equus Saddle
items.description: A saddle for your horse. Useful for crafting chemical supplies on the go!

items.name: Excavation Rig
items.description: Stryders equipped with this rig can mine high-value resources like stone and metal. Can be linked to a Tek Dedicated Box.

Everyone poops.

items.name: Federation Exo Boots
items.description:
Highly advanced boots capable of absorbing the impact of falling from high distances.
Equipping requires learning this Tekgram.

items.description: You can use this to skin the appearance of a pair of boots. Looks like a genuine pair of Terran Federation tek-reinforced exo-boots!

items.name: Federation Exo Helmet
items.description:
Never get lost again with the Tek Helmets night vision. Also provides a targeting mode that reveals other characters' positions, and infinite oxygen while underwater.
Equipping requires learning this Tekgram.

items.description: You can use this to skin the appearance of a helmet or hat. Looks like a genuine Terran Federation tek-reinforced exo-helmet!

items.name: Federation Exo-Chestpiece
items.description:
Highly advanced chestpiece with an integrated jetpack.
Equipping requires learning this Tekgram.

items.name: Federation Exo-Gloves
items.description:
Highly advanced gauntlets that allow the wearer to perform devastating punches.
Equipping requires learning this Tekgram.

items.description: You can use this to skin the appearance of gloves.  Looks like a genuine pair of Terran Federation tek-reinforced Exp-Gloves!

items.name: Federation Exo-leggings
items.description: Highly advanced leggings that allow for powerful forward movement. Equipping requires learning this Tekgram.

items.name: Federation Exo-leggings Skin
items.description: You can use this to skin the appearance of leggings or pants.  Looks like a genuine pair of Terran Federation tek-reinforced exo-pants!

items.description: This creamy dish improves the body's natural constitution.  Consume it to slow your rate of oxygen consumption while underwater, and gain extra health regen.  Effects last 15 minutes.

items.description:
MegaMek Operational Materialization Interface. Drag this to a Mek Module slot to enable forming the MegaMek!
Requires three additional nearby Meks to transform. Will fail to operate unless if not in range of the Alpha King Titan.

items.description: Mek Rocket Launcher Module. Equip a Mek with this module to arm it with a wide reaching swarm-fire rocket launcher. Unequipping reduces durability. Requires Rocket Pods to fire.

items.name: M.S.C.M.
items.description: Mek Siege Cannon Module. Equip a Mek with this module to arm it with a powerful long-range siege cannon. Unequipping reduces durability. Requires Cannon Shells to fire.

items.name: Metal
items.description: A lump of unrefined metal ore, mined from rocks usually found high on mountains, or in caves. Can be refined in a Forge.

items.name: Metal Arrow
items.description: An armor-and-hide piercing metal arrow.

items.name: Metal Billboard
items.description: A large metal billboard for landmark navigation or relaying messages.

items.name: Metal Catwalk
items.description: A thin walkway for bridging areas together.  Made from metal plates.

items.name: Metal Ceiling
items.description: A stable metal-plated concrete ceiling that provides insulation, and doubles as a floor for higher levels.

items.name: Metal Cliff Platform
items.description: A Cliff Platform is required to build structures extending from a cliff. This one is made from shiny metal.

items.name: Metal Dinosaur Gate
items.description: A large metal gate that can be used with a Gateway to most keep dinosaurs in or out.

items.name: Metal Dinosaur Gateway
items.description: A large metal gateway that can be used with a Gate to keep most dinosaurs in or out.

items.name: Metal Door
items.description: A stable metal-plated concrete door that provides entance to structures. Can be locked for security.

items.name: Metal Doorframe
items.description: A metal-plated concrete wall that provides entrance to a structure.

items.name: Metal Double Door
items.description: A stable metal-plated concrete door that provides entance to structures. Can be locked for security.

items.name: Metal Double Doorframe
items.description: A metal-plated concrete wall that provides entrance to a structure.

items.name: Metal Fence Foundation
items.description: This very strong, narrow foundation is used to build walls around an area.

items.name: Metal Fence Support
items.description: Acts as a foundation so you can build on fence walls. Doesn't follow ground so can build level fences.

items.name: Metal Foundation
items.description: A foundation is required to build structures in an area.  This one is made from sturdy metal-plated concrete.

items.name: Metal Hatchet
items.description: A sharp metal hatchet for harvesting wood from trees, stone from rocks, and skin from bodies.

items.name: Metal Hatchet
items.description: A sharp metal hatchet for harvesting wood from trees, stone from rocks, and skin from bodies.

items.name: Metal Hatchframe
items.description: This metal-plated concrete ceiling has a hole in it for trapdoors.

items.name: Metal Ingot
items.description: Created by refining metal ore in a Forge.

items.name: Metal Irrigation Pipe - Flexible
items.description: Connects nearby pipes dynamically.

items.name: Metal Irrigation Pipe - Inclined
items.description: An inclined metal pipe for an irrigation network, used for transporting water up and down hills.

items.name: Metal Irrigation Pipe - Intake
items.description: The metal intake for an irrigation network that transports water over land.

items.name: Metal Irrigation Pipe - Intersection
items.description: A plus-shaped metal intersection for an irrigation network, used for splitting one water source into three.

items.name: Metal Irrigation Pipe - Straight
items.description: A straight metal pipe for an irrigation network, used for transporting water across land.

items.name: Metal Irrigation Pipe - Tap
items.description: This metal tap allows access to the water in an irrigation network.  Can refill containers, irrigate crop plots, or provide a refreshing drink.

items.name: Metal Irrigation Pipe - Vertical
items.description: An vertical metal pipe for an irrigation network, used for transporting water up and down cliffs.

items.name: Metal Ladder
items.description: A simple metal ladder used to climb up or down tall structures.  Can also be used to extend existing ladders.

items.name: Metal Ocean Platform
items.description: Floats on the surface of bodies of water.

items.name: Metal Pick
items.description: A large metal pick for harvesting primarily flint from rocks, thatch from trees, and meat from bodies.

items.name: Metal Pillar
items.description: This metal-plated concrete pillar adds structural integrity to the area it is build under.  Can also act as stilts for buildings on inclines.

items.name: Metal Railing
items.description: A metal-plated concrete railing that acts as a simple barrier to prevent people from falling.

items.name: Metal Ramp
items.description: An inclined metal-plated concrete floor for travelling up or down levels.  Can also be used to make an angled roof.

items.name: Metal Shield
items.description: A metal shield on a layer of leather. Absorbs damage from the front when activated.

items.name: Metal Sickle

items.name: Wooden Sign
items.description: A simple wooden sign for landmark navigation or relaying messages.

items.name: Wooden Spike Wall
items.description: These incredibly sharp wooden stakes are dangerous to any that touch them.  Larger creatures take more damage.

items.name: Wooden Staircase
items.description: A wooden spiral staircase, useful in constructing multi-level buildings.

items.name: Wooden Stairs
items.description: Wooden stairs for travelling up or down levels. Can be switched to a ramp variant.

items.name: Wooden Table
items.description: A simple wooden table with a variety of uses.

items.name: Wooden Trapdoor
items.description: This small wooden door can be used to secure hatches.

items.name: Wooden Tree Platform
items.description: Attaches to a large tree, enabling you to build on it!

items.name: Wooden Triangle Ceiling
items.description: A stable wooden ceiling that insulates the inside from the outside, and doubles as a floor for higher levels.

items.name: Wooden Triangle Foundation
items.description: Required to build structures in an area. Triangle shaped.

items.name: Wooden Triangle Roof
items.description: A wood, sloped triangle roof.

items.name: Wooden Wall
items.description: A sturdy wooden wall that insulates the inside from the outside, separates rooms, and provides structural integrity.

items.name: Wooden Wall Sign
items.description: A simple wooden wall sign for basic messages, requires attaching to a wall.

items.name: Wooden Window
items.description: Wooden beams on hinges that cover windows to provide protection from projectiles and spying.

items.name: Wooden Windowframe
items.description: A wooden wall with a hole for a window.

items.name: Wool
items.description: Sheared from a sheep!

items.name: Woolly Rhino Horn
items.description: Used in very specialized Recipes...

items.name: Woolly Rhino Saddle
items.description: Equip a Woolly Rhino with this to ride it.

items.name: Wreath
items.description: A decorative collection of leaves that make any room festive. Requires attaching to a wall.

items.name: Wyvern Bone Costume
items.description: This costume can be used to make your Wyvern look just like a skeleton! Spoopy!

items.name: Wyvern Egg
items.description: Tremendously nourishing by itself, this egg provides extraordinary nutritional value in many cooking recipes.

items.name: Wyvern Gloves Skin
items.description: You can use this to skin the appearance of gloves. Provides a dangerous look!

items.name: Wyvern Milk
items.description: Eat it to gain nourishment, or feed to raise Wyverns!

items.name: Yellow Coloring
items.description: This substance can be used to color certain items and structures.

items.name: Yeti Swim Bottom Skin
items.description: You can use this to skin the appearance of pants into swim trunks on men or a bikini bottom on women. For swimmers with abominable taste in swimwear.

items.name: Yeti Swim Top Skin
items.description: You can use this to skin the appearance of a shirt into a bare chest on men or a bikini top on women. For swimmers with abominable taste in swimwear.

items.name: Yutyrannus Egg
items.description: Tremendously nourishing by itself, this egg provides extraordinary nutritional value in many cooking recipes.

items.name: Yutyrannus Lungs
items.description: This trophy proves your worth as a hunter.

items.name: Yutyrannus Saddle
items.description: Equip a Yutyrannus with this to ride it.

items.name: Zip-Line Anchor
items.description: Apply onto a Crossbow to fire Zip-Line anchor points. Use two anchor points to complete a Zip-Line, which you can then grab onto.

items.name: Zip-Line Motor Attachment Skin
items.description: Equip onto pants and combine with Gasoline to power yourself up a Zip-Line.

items.name: ZombDodo-Print Shirt Skin
items.description: You can use this to skin the appearance of a shirt, and just maybe you can slow-walk with the flock.

items.name: Zombie Wyvern-Print Shirt Skin
items.description: You can use this to skin the appearance of a shirt, and start dragon your holiday party to new heights!
